title: QA_ORBIT_ACCESS_THEOREM_CERT.v1
primary_source: Wall, D. D. (1960). Fibonacci series modulo m. American Mathematical Monthly 67(6), 525-532. DOI: 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541.
description: Fixture schema for QA Orbit Access Theorem Cert [279]. Each fixture declares a target a-value and the expected orbit counts from mod-9 route enumeration (all (b,e) with b+2e=a, b>=1, e>=1, A1-reduced). The claim is stratified by gcd(a,3): coprime_to_3 fixtures have zero Satellite and zero Singularity; mul_3_not_9 fixtures have positive Satellite and zero Singularity; mul_9 fixtures have positive Satellite and positive Singularity.
